name: @freeside-auth/auth-sdk
description: svc-JWT verifier SDK. Cell-side typed verification + 21-scenario substrate-grade conformance suite. Source-distributed per PRD v3.0 §11.

transitive.reason: auth-sdk's ./svc-jwt-claims re-exports the canonical Effect.Schema artifacts from this file

auth-sdk's ./verify re-exports verifySvcJwt + verifier types from svc-jwt-verifier.ts; PostgresDenylistCheck (used as the DenylistCheck impl in production) lives in denylist-postgres.ts; argon2-params.ts is pulled in via the adapters barrel's IArgon2idVerifier type alias

import_rewrites.reason: auth-sdk imports the protocol package via the workspace alias; vendored consumers don't have the alias — point at the copied source
same — workspace alias must be rewritten to the copied source path

verification_steps: 1. Run `tsc --noEmit` on the consumer to confirm typecheck clean.
2. Run the conformance suite: `import { runConformanceSuite } from '<vendor-base>/auth-sdk'; await runConformanceSuite()` — assert `result.ok === true`.

compose_with.name: @freeside-auth/identity-client
compose_with.reason: sibling source-distributed SDK — typed HTTP client for identity-api. Coexists with auth-sdk; the two have different concerns (HTTP surface vs crypto/verify). Many consumers vendor BOTH.

shell: # 1. Clone identity-api at a pinned SHA
# 2. Copy auth-sdk source + transitive deps into your consumer
# 3. Rewrite workspace aliases to vendored paths
# 4. Install peer dependencies in your consumer's package.json
# 5. Run the conformance suite to confirm the vendored copy is intact

cli_recipe.note: The freeside-cli vendor-add command is not yet implemented as of W2.5 Sprint 3. Use the manual_recipe.shell steps above. When the CLI lands, this single command will execute all 5 manual steps idempotently.

conformance.callable: import { runConformanceSuite } from '@0xhoneyjar/auth'; const r = await runConformanceSuite();
conformance.description: Substrate-grade gate per PRD NF-Sec-1. 11 D-1.1 §8 canonical + 6 fuzz + 4 order-of-ops invariants. Downstream cells MUST re-run this suite in their CI; any scenario failure blocks merge across the cluster.

changes: Initial registry entry. Files + transitive + peer_deps shape codified.
Manual recipe authored; freeside-cli automation marked forward-track.
